instructions.title: Steps to obtain the "Hik IOT" token
instructions.step1:
1. On your computer browser, open the "Hik IOT" workspace:
https://www.hikiot.com/tenant/workBench
instructions.step2: 2. Log in with the SMS verification code. Make sure the phone number matches the one used in the mini program.
instructions.step3: 3. After logging in, press "F12" to open the developer tools (or right-click the page and choose "Inspect").
instructions.step4: 4. Follow the guide below to copy the value of "www_token" and paste it into the field below.

messages.tokenStored: After a successful login, the token is saved locally in your browser for faster login next time.
messages.tokenExpiry: The token is valid for 30 days. You can reuse it during the validity period and need to retrieve a new one afterward.
messages.tokenLengthError: The token must be 36 characters. Please check and try again.
messages.invalidToken: Invalid token, please retrieve it again.
messages.networkError: Network error, please try again later.
messages.restDayPrompt: Today's rule is rest. Do you still want to check in?

hints.avoidRepeat: Please do not click repeatedly to avoid duplicate check-ins.
hints.learningOnly: For learning and communication only. Use responsibly.
